title: Sub-Chapter 9. Enrollment: On-the-Job (OJT)/Apprenticeship - LTS Data Entry Rules
description: This section gives you step-by-step directions on how to add a Non-college degree that is not from an Institution of higher learning to the enrollment screen in the Long Term Solution.
